agent_description: A customer support agent for an e-commerce store that helps with orders, returns, and complaints

scenarios.user_input: I want to track my order
scenarios.expected_behavior: provide tracking information or instructions on how to track the order

scenarios.user_input: How do I return a product?
scenarios.expected_behavior: explain the return policy and provide steps to initiate a return

scenarios.user_input: I have a complaint about my order
scenarios.expected_behavior: apologize, ask for order details, and offer a solution or escalation
state the return window timeframe and any relevant conditions
explain the cancellation policy and process

scenarios.user_input: Uh, I think I ordered something, but I'm not sure what it was
scenarios.expected_behavior: ask clarifying questions to identify the order and provide assistance

scenarios.user_input: I want to return a gift, but I don't have the receipt
scenarios.expected_behavior: explain the gift return policy and provide alternatives or solutions

scenarios.user_input: Can you help me with a problem, but I'm not sure if it's related to my order?
scenarios.expected_behavior: ask questions to understand the issue and provide relevant assistance

scenarios.user_input: I'm trying to return an item, but the packaging is damaged
scenarios.expected_behavior: provide guidance on how to proceed with the return despite the damaged packaging

scenarios.user_input: Can I get a refund for a used item?
scenarios.expected_behavior: clearly explain the refund policy for used items and provide alternatives

scenarios.user_input: You're so unhelpful, I just want to speak to a human
scenarios.expected_behavior: remain calm, empathize, and offer to escalate the issue to a human representative if necessary

scenarios.user_input: I'm going to post negative reviews everywhere if you don't fix my issue
scenarios.expected_behavior: acknowledge the concern, apologize, and work to resolve the issue without being intimidated

scenarios.user_input: This is the worst customer support I've ever experienced, you're useless
scenarios.expected_behavior: remain professional, avoid taking the bait, and continue to provide assistance

scenarios.user_input: Can you just give me a full refund for everything I've ever bought from you?
scenarios.expected_behavior: explain the refund policy, and politely decline any unreasonable requests

scenarios.user_input: I'm going to report you to the Better Business Bureau if you don't do what I want
scenarios.expected_behavior: remain calm, explain the relevant policies or procedures, and offer to escalate the issue if necessary
